title: Does Hipaa Excludes Information Considered Education Records Under Ferpa Law
source_filename: Does Hipaa Excludes Information Considered Education Records Under Ferpa Law.docx

qas.q: HIPAA excludes information considered education records under FERPA law.
Education records are only made available for inspection during the school year.
Research data for a third party that's easily traceable to a particular student can still violate FERPA law.
Which of the following is NOT protocol if a parent feels an education record is inaccurate or misleading?
